name: tsrun-toolkit
description: Dev workflow skills (commit, fix-types, doc) with Obsidian and Playwright MCP integrations.

obsidian_api_key.title: Obsidian API Key
obsidian_api_key.description: Obsidian Local REST API key (from plugin settings)

hooks.command: if command -v paplay >/dev/null 2>&1; then paplay /usr/share/sounds/freedesktop/stereo/message.oga 2>/dev/null; elif command -v aplay >/dev/null 2>&1; then aplay /usr/share/sounds/freedesktop/stereo/message.oga 2>/dev/null; elif command -v powershell.exe >/dev/null 2>&1; then powershell.exe -NoProfile -c "(New-Object Media.SoundPlayer 'C:\Windows\Media\chimes.wav').PlaySync()"; fi
